hotels.description_en:
Historic Setting: Landmark Inn in Cooperstown offers a 4-star bed and breakfast experience within a historic building. The property is adults-only and highly rated for its excellent service and cleanliness.
Comfortable Accommodations: Rooms feature air-conditioning, private bathrooms with walk-in showers, bathrobes, and free toiletries. Additional amenities include streaming services, work desks, and garden views.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests enjoy free WiFi, a garden, terrace, and outdoor seating area. Free bicycles are available for exploring the surroundings.
Delicious Breakfast: A full English or Irish breakfast is served, including vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free options. Breakfast is highly praised by guests.
